rationale: Deadly Russian strikes on Kyiv killing nine are a direct continuation of active combat affecting Ukrainian residents; the US-Iran deal's confirmation raises concern about Western attention diversion but is not a new qualitative change from last cycle.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Confirmed deadly Russian strikes on Kyiv killing nine and destroying a historic cathedral directly affect Ukrainian residents' safety and morale — continuation of active war at established high baseline.

top_events.title: US and Iran announce deal to end conflict
top_events.summary: The confirmed US-Iran peace understanding continues to raise concern in Ukraine that US diplomatic and military attention may shift away from Ukrainian support.

top_events.title: G7 meeting in France
top_events.summary: G7 discussions may include Ukraine support and war-related topics — no confirmed outcomes yet, but relevant to Ukraine's diplomatic and aid situation.
